subject: Delay on Hoodie Shipment
summary: Hoodie blanks are delayed by 4 days due to supplier backlog.
suggestedAction: Request partial shipment and revised ETA.
draft: Thanks for the update. Can you confirm whether a partial shipment of 75 hoodie blanks can go out this week? We are seeing increased demand and want to avoid a stockout. Please also send the revised ETA for the remaining units.

subject: Wrong Size Received
summary: Customer received a small instead of a medium hoodie.
suggestedAction: Apologize and send replacement with prepaid return label.
businessImpact: Poor review risk if not resolved quickly.
draft: I'm sorry about the mix-up. We will send the correct size at no additional cost and provide a prepaid return label for the incorrect item. Thank you for giving us the chance to fix this.

subject: Campaign Performance Update
summary: Hoodie ad has 3.8x ROAS; tote ad is performing at 1.0x ROAS.
suggestedAction: Scale hoodie ad budget 20% and pause tote campaign.
businessImpact: Missed revenue opportunity if hoodie budget not scaled.
draft: Thanks for the update. We would like to increase the hoodie campaign budget by 20% for a 48-hour test period. Please pause the tote campaign effective immediately and reallocate that budget.

subject: Custom Shirt Bulk Order Inquiry
summary: Student group wants 75 custom AI-themed shirts for an upcoming event.
businessImpact: Potential $1,650 sale lost if not responded to quickly.
draft: Thanks for reaching out. For a 75-shirt order, we can offer bulk pricing at $22 per shirt before shipping. Please send the size breakdown, design preference, and event deadline so we can confirm production timing.

subject: Payment Dispute Notice
summary: Customer opened a $58 dispute for a Built With AI Hoodie order.
suggestedAction: Upload tracking and order confirmation proof.
businessImpact: Potential $58 revenue loss plus chargeback fee.
draft: We will upload the order confirmation, tracking number, and delivery confirmation today so the dispute can be reviewed with supporting documentation.

subject: New Design Concepts Ready
summary: Designer sent 4 new AI-themed shirt concepts for review.
suggestedAction: Review designs by Friday and provide feedback.
businessImpact: Slower product pipeline if feedback is delayed.
draft: Thanks for sending these over. I'll review all four concepts by Friday and send consolidated feedback. They look promising at first glance.

subject: Feature Opportunity — Builder Brands Roundup
summary: AI Weekly (98k subscribers) wants to feature PromptWear in a Friday roundup of AI builder merch.
suggestedAction: Send 3 product photos, a 75-word brand blurb, and a discount code by Wednesday.
businessImpact: Estimated 800-1,200 referral sessions and ~25 incremental orders.
draft: Thrilled to be considered. I'll send three high-res product photos, a 75-word brand blurb, and a one-time promo code (PROMPT15) by end of day Wednesday. Let me know if you also need founder context for the piece.

subject: Order #4821 — Never Arrived
summary: Customer's order shows delivered 6 days ago but never arrived. Threatening to leave a 1-star review.
suggestedAction: Offer immediate reship and a 15% credit for the inconvenience.
businessImpact: Public 1-star review can suppress conversion on the affected SKU for weeks.
draft: I'm really sorry, Alex. I'm reshipping your order today via expedited shipping at no cost, plus a 15% credit on your account for the trouble. You'll get a new tracking number within 2 hours.

subject: Cohort Swag Inquiry — 220 Units
summary: Y-Combinator-style accelerator wants 220 hoodies for their summer cohort welcome kit.
suggestedAction: Confirm capacity, send quote at $46/unit, request 50% deposit.
businessImpact: Potential $10,120 order; recurring relationship if first batch is clean.
draft: Great to connect. We can fulfill 220 hoodies at $46/unit (volume pricing), with a 4-week lead time from deposit. I'll send a formal quote and timeline today. Standard terms are 50% deposit, 50% on shipment.

subject: Checkout Error Reports — Last 24h
summary: 11 customers hit a checkout error on mobile Safari yesterday. Likely lost ~$420 in revenue.
suggestedAction: Patch the Safari checkout bug today; review the affected sessions in analytics.
businessImpact: Continued bug could cost $400+ per day in abandoned mobile carts.
draft: Thanks for flagging. We'll roll back the most recent theme update tonight and re-test the mobile Safari checkout flow before redeploying. Please send the list of affected order attempts so we can recover those customers.

subject: Love the hoodie — quick fit question
summary: Repeat customer asking whether the hoodie runs true to size before reordering 2 more.
suggestedAction: Reply with size chart and confirm true-to-size fit.
businessImpact: Likely $116 follow-on sale; loyal customer worth retaining.
draft: Thanks Jordan — and glad to hear it. The Built With AI Hoodie runs true to size for most people; if you're between sizes we'd recommend the larger one. Size chart attached. Use REPEAT10 at checkout for 10% off your next order.

subject: Potential infringement on 'Built With AI'
summary: Automated trademark monitoring flagged a competitor selling a similar 'Built By AI' hoodie.
suggestedAction: Review the listing; consult counsel before sending any cease & desist.
businessImpact: Brand dilution risk if not addressed, but premature action could be costly.
draft: Thanks for the flag. We'll review the listing internally this week and loop in trademark counsel before taking any external action. Please send any additional context (listing URL, first-seen date, sales volume estimate).
